chunks.text: The ancient Olympics in Greece were a festival of peace
even halting wars during the games.
The modern Olympics inherit that spirit.
Athlete from across the world, after long years of training, step into competition.
Their discipline and dedication are more precious than anything else.
Sportsmanship, the spirit of respecting an opponent and following the rules
is the true meaning of sport.
In recent years, the doping problem has shaken competition around the world.
Athletes who use banned drugs lose their medals and are removed from their sport.
To preserve the principle of fair play, strict testing is essential.
Winning teams gather enthusiastic fan, and losing teams receive quiet applause.
To accept defeat and turn toward the next challenge — this is the true beauty of sport.
Children in front of the television look up to these athletes.
they pass on to a younger generation the message that effort can bear fruit.
